author: trackreco
body:
#### PR description:

This PR introduces a relaxed pT cut for track candidates in the forward region while preserving the standard, specifically when using the mkFit track-building algorithm.
The main changes are:
- Introduced two mkFit new parameters: `candMinPtRelaxedCut`, `candMinAbsEtaForRelaxedCut`
- Candidate pT selection now depends on the  region:
 for ||  `candMinAbsEtaForRelaxedCut`: standard cut `candMinPtCut`
for || > `candMinAbsEtaForRelaxedCut`: relaxed cut _candMinPtRelaxedCut_
- Updated candidate selection logic is applied:
in MkFitFitProducer (for cases when mkFit track fitting is enabled)
in MkFitOutputConverter (for mkFit building only)
- Phase-2 HLT modules updated to include the new parameters.
- The relaxed cut for final tracks (Phase 2 hltGeneralTracks `MinPT` from 0.9  0.8 GeV) 

Impact: For Run 3 there is no change, while for the Phase-2 baseline it modifies the track selection in the forward region, as presented and motivated in the [Tracking POG meeting](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1655023/#86-update-on-hlt-phase-2-track).

No external dependencies.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

No
title: Relaxed pT cut for built track candidates and hltGeneralTracks (Phase-2 baseline)
